summary: Notion stride-up alignment · 2 NEW schemas + 5 patches additifs + 3 NEW orchestrators + 2 patches skills + NEW Notion bridge doctrine. Audit Phase 1 quantifie gap 70% coverage workspace stride-up canvas Onday (11 collections opérationnalisant doctrine compositional-cartography 4 arbres + matrice + modulateurs). Principe canon · PhantomOS = source of truth, Notion = UI optionnelle pour opérateurs préférant interface tabulaire navigable. v2.56 patches · friction.schema NEW v1.0 (FRC-NN id, category enum physical/emotional/friction_ux/logistical/cognitive, severity_score 1-10, customer_evidence, cross_refs vers objections + pain_points) · roadmap.schema NEW v1.0 (RDM-{brand_slug} id, phases, mix axis enum, production_status, relations) · spec.schema v1.9 → v1.10 (benefits emotional_signal + latency_min/max + evidence_verbatim, mechanism duration, meta.validation_status $ref _shared) · profile.schema v1.4 → v1.6 (pain_category enum cohérent friction, objections severity_score + response_counter + derived_angle_refs) · offer.schema v2.1 → v2.2 + brand.schema v2.2 → v2.3 (meta.validation_status uniformisé). 3 NEW orchestrators · build-atlas-complete v1.0 (pipeline P0-P5 complet 9 sub-skills chain) · produce-paid-matrix v1.0 (zone 3→4 chain produce-paid-angles → weight-dimensions → score-matrix · output top-3 territoires stars qualitatives, scoring chiffré jamais exposé) · creative-brief-composer v1.0 (zone 4 path · brief + N variants créa avec operator gate validate). brief.schema orphan activée · produce-copy-brief v1.3 → v1.4 (Step 6bis Layer C frontmatter brief.schema v1.0 + storage path canonical brands/{slug}/briefs/{BRF-NN}.md). produce-paid-angles v1.6.1 → v1.7 (encart pivot audiences fin Step 9 · matérialise capability Notion zone 3→4 filter-by-persona). NEW doctrine notion-bridge-doctrine.md (PhantomOS=truth + Notion=UI + mappings 11 collections + tags universels source/confidence/validation_status mapping vers _field_types). Cross-ref compositional-cartography · .mcp.json.example notion server entry · capabilities.md 8 scenarios Notion ↔ PhantomOS · schema-encoding-discipline §13 NEW Schema evolutions registry. Backward compat strict additif partout. Manifest skills regen 60 skills (+3 orchestrators Bloc 2 + 1 sync-notion-atlas Bloc 3).
